category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts ebooks from EPUB to KEPUB; official docs describe Kepubify as converting EPUBs to Kobo EPUBs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kepubify; official homepage heading is kepubify.
docs_sources: Official Kepubify site has a dedicated /docs/ documentation section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/pgaskin/kepubify, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI ebook converter; official docs mention EPUB, KEPUB, Kobo, kepubify, covergen, and seriesmeta.
